qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: IDOR in Share Path Update - No Scope Validation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is share-related but targets PATCH /api/share path updates and missing scope validation, not /public/api/share/info reflecting a persisted tokenized DownloadURL for password-protected shares.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: HTTP Server Missing ReadHeaderTimeout Enables Slowloris DoS
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns HTTP server timeout configuration and Slowloris denial of service, not public share metadata disclosure or tokenized download URL generation.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: OIDC CSRF Protection Disabled - State/Nonce Validation Commented Out
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns OIDC state and nonce validation, not password-protected public shares or /public/api/share/info leaking a bearer download capability.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path Traversal via Absolute Path Bypass in SanitizeUserPath
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns absolute path handling in resource access, not share info serialization or tokenized DownloadURL leakage from password-protected shares.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded Chunked Upload Size - DoS via Client-Controlled Parameters
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns resource upload size validation and disk/resource exhaustion, not the public share info endpoint exposing tokenized download URLs.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying_vuln finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is specifically about FileBrowser Quantum writing tokenized DownloadURL values into share models and /public/api/share/info returning CommonShare without clearing DownloadURL for password-protected shares. The only public share authentication-bypass folder is status=no_vuln, and the qualifying share finding is a different PATCH /api/share path-update authorization issue.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-525j-95gf-766f describes /public/api/share/info disclosing a tokenized downloadURL for password-protected shares through convertToFrontendShareResponse/getShareURL and CommonShare serialization.
Qualifying finding idor-share-path-update targets backend/http/share.go sharePatchHandler path updates and missing scope validation, not share info disclosure of DownloadURL.

Qualifying findings missing-http-header-timeout-dos, oidc-csrf-bypass, path-traversal-absolute-path-bypass, and unbounded-upload-dos address unrelated HTTP timeout, OIDC, resource path, and upload-size root causes.
public-share-auth-bypass is marked no_vuln and therefore cannot be selected under the judging rules for qualifying_vuln findings.
